**Internal Deal Memo: Project Phoenix**

Date: October 15, 2023  
To: Acquisition Committee  
From: Ms. Eleanor Tan, Senior Analyst  

Subject: Overview of Proposed Acquisition - Codename: Project Phoenix

We are pleased to present the acquisition proposal for Project Phoenix. The target company, Orbital Dynamics Pte Ltd, with UEN 201234567K, is valued at SGD 45 million. The Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") outlines the terms and conditions.

Key Contact: Dr. Marcus Lim  
NRIC: S7654321Z  
Email: marcus.lim@orbitaldynamics.sg  
Phone: +65 6123 4567  

Please note the current project status does not include a finalized project plan. Discussions are ongoing, and the SPA is under review. For more details, please refer to the secure document portal: https://secureportal.sg/user/S7654321Z.

For further inquiries, contact Ms. Eleanor Tan via eleanor.tan@acquisitions.sg or call +65 6876 5432.
